title: Manufacturing Engineer - Larsen & Toubro - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Larsen & Toubro - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Larsen & Toubro is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Larsen & Toubro:
Larsen & Toubro is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
